escalations.topic: Top customer is 18% of MRR (concentration risk)
options: Cap net new acquisitions in their vertical for 60 days
Accelerate diversification via SEO content flywheel
Request a 12-month commit to lock them in
escalations.recommendation: Request 12-month commit + diversify with inbound for 60 days.

escalations.topic: One delivery SLA miss this week (customer: Acme Corp, +2 days)
options: Apologize + offer free extra article as goodwill
Investigate root cause (agent timeout, source gathering, or QA loop)
escalations.recommendation: Do both; root-cause in agent log first.
